summary: Iteration 4 testing completed successfully. All new features working: 580 SQL problems with chatbot, enhanced LeetCode-style descriptions, pattern visualizer, and step-by-step debugger.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing test user and 580 SQL problems seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features verified working: 1) 580 SQL problems with pagination and category/difficulty filters, 2) SQL Mentor chatbot for SQL help, 3) Enhanced LeetCode-style descriptions with examples/constraints/hints/complexity, 4) Pattern visualizer with key insight/when to use/similar problems/algorithm steps, 5) Step-by-step debugger with progress bar/prev-next navigation/all steps timeline. Backend uses real Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM Key for AI features.

sql_problems_580.details: GET /api/sql/problems returns 580 total SQL problems. Pagination works (page/limit params). Category filter (JOINs returns 80 problems). Difficulty filter works. Problems have sql_id, title, difficulty, description, category fields.

sql_category_filter.details: GET /api/sql/problems?category=JOINs correctly filters to 80 JOINs problems. All returned problems have category='JOINs'.

sql_chat_mentor.details: POST /api/sql/chat returns AI response for SQL help. Tested with 'How do I write a JOIN query?' - received detailed markdown response with SQL examples.

enhanced_description.details: GET /api/problems/prob_00001/description returns LeetCode-style description with: description, 3 examples (input/output/explanation), 4 constraints, 3 hints, approach, time_complexity O(n), space_complexity O(n). Cached in MongoDB enhanced_descriptions collection.

pattern_visualizer.details: GET /api/problems/prob_00001/visualizer returns pattern visualization with: pattern_name 'Two Pointers', pattern_explanation, 6 steps with step/title/description/state/highlight, key_insight, when_to_use (4 scenarios), similar_problems (4 problems). Cached in MongoDB pattern_visualizations collection.

step_debugger.details: Debugger tab shows step-by-step visualization with progress bar, Prev/Next navigation, all steps timeline. Steps show array state with pointers like '[2, 7, 11, 15] left=0 right=3'. Navigation between steps works correctly.

sql_playground_ui.details: SQL Lab page shows: '580 problems across 14 categories', 3 tabs (Playground/Problems/Schema), SQL editor with syntax highlighting, Run Query button, SQL Mentor chatbot, category and difficulty filters.

problem_workspace_tabs.details: Problem Workspace has 4 tabs: Description (with examples/constraints/hints), Tests, Pattern (visualizer), Debugger (step-by-step). All tabs load correctly and display data.

test_classes: TestSQLProblemsAPI (5 tests) - 580 problems, pagination, category filter, difficulty filter, structure
TestSQLChatAPI (2 tests) - chat response, chat with context
TestEnhancedDescriptionAPI (5 tests) - description, examples, constraints, hints, complexity
TestPatternVisualizerAPI (5 tests) - visualizer, steps, key insight, when to use, similar problems
TestSQLExecuteAPI (2 tests) - execute select, execute join
